items.description: Crash on I-95 southbound between Exit 6: TO PA 320/TO PA 352 - PROVIDENCE AVE/EDGMONT AV and Exit 4: US 322 EAST - COMM BARRY BR/NEW JERSEY. There is a lane restriction.
